hero.subtext: One-of-a-kind Blitz bats, wrapped and taped by hand. Pick your colors, pick your style — every bat is built to your specs.

about.heading: Built in the Backyard.
about.body:
Blitz Bat Works started the way every great backyard idea does — with a beat-up wiffle bat, a roll of tape, and a summer afternoon.

What began as customizing bats for pickup games turned into something more: bats built to order, each one wrapped and finished by hand. No two are the same. Every bat gets its own color scheme, its own grip, its own personality.

Whether you're squaring up for a home run derby, a family cookout tournament, or you just want a bat that actually looks like yours — we've got you covered.
about.card_text: Every bat is hand-taped from start to finish. You pick the colors, patterns, and grip style — we build it. No mass production, no cookie-cutter designs.

products.name: Classic Wrap
products.description: Clean two-color tape job with a solid grip. The everyday bat for backyard ballers.

products.name: Spiral Series
products.description: Multi-color spirals down the barrel. Loud, fast, and impossible to miss.

products.name: Team Colors
products.description: Rep your team, your school, or your squad. Send us your colors — we'll match them.

products.name: Fully Custom
products.description: Got a design in mind? Send it over. If we can tape it, we'll build it.

gallery.heading: Past Builds
gallery.subtext: A few bats we've made recently.

contact.heading: Order a Bat.
contact.subtext: Tell us what you're looking for — colors, style, quantity — and we'll get back to you with pricing and turnaround time.
